  • Class
    Description
    DummyAgent
    When we provide copies of GameView to you, we replace the actual agents with these dummy agents for security reasons.
    FSMAgent
    Represents a class that moves through a finite state machine when deciding what Actions to make during its turn.
    FSMAgent.MovePhase
     
    HumanAgent
    An agent controlled by a human player via the UI.
    HumanAgent.InputMode
     
    IAgent
    Represents the base agent that can take an action in Risk.
    NeuralQAgent
    Represents a agent containing a neural network acting as a q-function.
    RandomAgent
    An agent that makes random decisions.
    StaticAgent
    Represents a "neutral territory" agent.
    TrainerAgent
     
    TrainerAgent.TrainConfig
